SystemStatus.Description: System status not correct to perform test

StatusCheckFailure.Description: System status not correct to perform test

NoABSData.Description: Can not evaluate ABS results, no data was sampled

InvalidBroadcastTireSize.Description: Invalid tire size provided by broadcast

WheelForceDataReadError.Description: System error reading wheel force data array

LowSpeedSensorTestSystemCommFailure.Description: Failure reading roller speeds during low speed sensor test

HighSpeedSensorTestSystemCommFailure.Description: Failure reading roller speeds during high speed sensor test

DumpAllValvesFail.Description: Communication failure dumping all ABS valves

DumpFrontValvesFail.Description: Communication failure dumping front ABS valves

DumpRearValvesFail.Description: Communication failure dumping rear ABS valves

HoldAllValvesFail.Description: Communication failure holding all ABS valves

RecoverAllValvesFail.Description: Communication failure recovering brake force at all valves

StopRollTestModeFail.Description: Communication failure taking module out of roll test mode

SoftwareFailure.Description: Software failure detected - Please notify BEP!

UplineTestsIncomplete.Description: Upline tests not complete prior to rolls testing

TargetSpeedTimeout.Description: Timeout waiting for vehicle to be in speed range

BrakeSwitchTimeout.Description: Timeout waiting for brake switch to be in position

BrakeSwitchStatesNotSeen.Description: Failed to see brake switch in both ON and OFF position

StartModuleKeepAliveFail.Description: Failed to start module keep alive thread

StopModuleKeepAliveFail.Description: Failed to stop module keep alive thread

PartNumberMismatch.Description: Module part number does not match broadcast

VINMismatch.Description: Module VIN does not match broadcast

EvacAndFillIncomplete.Description: Evac and fill procedure not completed prior to rolls testing

FluidFillSwitchOn.Description: Fluid Fill Switch is ON - Check Brake fluid level\n

LowSpeedSensorTestFail.Description: Low speed wheel sensor test failed

LeftFrontLowSpeedSensorTestSensorHigh.Description: Low Speed: Left Front wheel speed sensor reading high

RightFrontLowSpeedSensorTestSensorHigh.Description: Low Speed: Right Front wheel speed sensor reading high

LeftRearLowSpeedSensorTestSensorHigh.Description: Low Speed: Left Rear wheel speed sensor reading high

RightRearLowSpeedSensorTestSensorHigh.Description: Low Speed: Right Rear wheel speed sensor reading high

LeftFrontLowSpeedSensorTestSensorLow.Description: Low Speed: Left Front wheel speed sensor reading low

RightFrontLowSpeedSensorTestSensorLow.Description: Low Speed: Right Front wheel speed sensor reading low

LeftRearLowSpeedSensorTestSensorLow.Description: Low Speed: Left Rear wheel speed sensor reading low

RightRearLowSpeedSensorTestSensorLow.Description: Low Speed: Right Rear wheel speed sensor reading low

HighSpeedSensorTestFail.Description: High speed wheel sensor test failed

LeftFrontHighSpeedSensorTestSensorHigh.Description: High Speed: Left Front wheel speed sensor reading high

RightFrontHighSpeedSensorTestSensorHigh.Description: High Speed: Right Front wheel speed sensor reading high

LeftRearHighSpeedSensorTestSensorHigh.Description: High Speed: Left Rear wheel speed sensor reading high

RightRearHighSpeedSensorTestSensorHigh.Description: High Speed: Right Rear wheel speed sensor reading high

LeftFrontHighSpeedSensorTestSensorLow.Description: High Speed: Left Front wheel speed sensor reading low

RightFrontHighSpeedSensorTestSensorLow.Description: High Speed: Right Front wheel speed sensor reading low

LeftRearHighSpeedSensorTestSensorLow.Description: High Speed: Left Rear wheel speed sensor reading low

RightRearHighSpeedSensorTestSensorLow.Description: High Speed: Right Rear wheel speed sensor reading low

ExcessiveBrakeForce.Description: Excessive brake force used to stop vehicle, inspect tires for damage

LeftFrontForceFault.Description: Left Front brake force out of limits

RightFrontForceFault.Description: Right Front brake force out of limits

LeftRearForceFault.Description: Left Rear brake force out of limits

RightRearForceFault.Description: Right Rear brake force out of limits

FrontBalanceFault.Description: Front side to side brake balance out of limits

RearBalanceFault.Description: Rear side to side brake balance out of limits

FrontToRearBalanceFault.Description: Front to rear brake balance out of limits

LeftFrontValveCrossedWithRightFront.Description: Left Front valve crossed with Right Front valve

LeftFrontValveCrossedWithRightRear.Description: Left Front valve crossed with Right Rear valve

LeftFrontValveCrossedWithLeftRear.Description: Left Front valve crossed with Left Rear valve

LeftRearValveCrossedWithLeftFront.Description: Left Rear valve crossed with Left Front valve

LeftRearValveCrossedWithRightFront.Description: Left Rear valve crossed with Right Front valve

LeftRearValveCrossedWithRightRear.Description: Left Rear valve crossed with Right Rear valve

RightFrontValveCrossedWithLeftFront.Description: Right Front valve crossed with Left Front valve

RightFrontValveCrossedWithRightRear.Description: Right Front valve crossed with Right Rear valve

RightFrontValveCrossedWithLeftRear.Description: Right Front valve crossed with Left Rear valve

RightRearValveCrossedWithLeftFront.Description: Right Rear valve crossed with Left Front valve

RightRearValveCrossedWithRightFront.Description: Right Rear valve crossed with Right Front valve

RightRearValveCrossedWithLeftRear.Description: Right Rear valve crossed with Left Rear valve

LeftFrontSensorCrossedWithRightFront.Description: Left Front wheel speed sensor crossed with Right Front

LeftFrontSensorCrossedWithRightRear.Description: Left Front wheel speed sensor crossed with Right Rear

LeftFrontSensorCrossedWithLeftRear.Description: Left Front wheel speed sensor crossed with Left Rear

LeftRearSensorCrossedWithLeftFront.Description: Left Rear wheel speed sensor crossed with Left Front

LeftRearSensorCrossedWithRightFront.Description: Left Rear wheel speed sensor crossed with Right Front

LeftRearSensorCrossedWithRightRear.Description: Left Rear wheel speed sensor crossed with Right Rear

RightFrontSensorCrossedWithLeftFront.Description: Right Front wheel speed sensor crossed with Left Front

RightFrontSensorCrossedWithRightRear.Description: Right Front wheel speed sensor crossed with Right Rear

RightFrontSensorCrossedWithLeftRear.Description: Right Front wheel speed sensor crossed with Left Rear

RightRearSensorCrossedWithLeftFront.Description: Right Rear wheel speed sensor crossed with Left Front

RightRearSensorCrossedWithRightFront.Description: Right Rear wheel speed sensor crossed with Right Front

RightRearSensorCrossedWithLeftRear.Description: Right Rear wheel speed sensor crossed with Left Rear

RearSensorCrossedWithLeftFront.Description: Rear wheel speed sensor crossed with Left Front

RearSensorCrossedWithRightFront.Description: Rear wheel speed sensor crossed with Right Front

CommandDriveModeFail.Description: DTCM Module failed to change drive mode

ModuleFault_500A.Description: Left Front Wheel Speed Sensor Circuit

ModuleFault_5011.Description: Left Front Wheel Speed Sensor Signal Erratic Performance

ModuleFault_5014.Description: Left Front Wheel Speed Comparative Performance

ModuleFault_5015.Description: Right Front Wheel Speed Sensor Circuit

ModuleFault_501C.Description: Right Front Wheel Speed Sensor Signal Erratic Performance

ModuleFault_501F.Description: Right Front Wheel Speed Comparative Performance

ModuleFault_5020.Description: Left Rear Wheel Speed Sensor Circuit

ModuleFault_5027.Description: Left Rear Wheel Speed Sensor Signal Erratic Performance

ModuleFault_502A.Description: Left Rear Wheel Speed Comparative Performance

ModuleFault_502B.Description: Right Rear Wheel Speed Sensor Circuit

ModuleFault_5032.Description: Right Rear Wheel Speed Sensor Signal Erratic Performance

ModuleFault_5035.Description: Right Rear Wheel Speed Comparative Performance

ModuleFault_503D.Description: Rear Wheel Speed Sensor Signal Erratic Performance

ModuleFault_5047.Description: Right Front Wheel Pressure Phase Monitoring

ModuleFault_5048.Description: Left Rear Wheel Pressure Phase Monitoring

ModuleFault_5049.Description: Right Rear Wheel Pressure Phase Monitoring

ModuleFault_504C.Description: Left Front Inlet Valve Control Circuit Low

ModuleFault_5050.Description: Right Front Inlet Valve Control Circuit Low

ModuleFault_5054.Description: Left Rear Inlet Valve Control Circuit Low

ModuleFault_5058.Description: Right Rear Inlet Valve Control Circuit Low

ModuleFault_505C.Description: Rear Inlet Valve Control Circuit Low

ModuleFault_5060.Description: Left Front Outlet Valve Control Circuit Low

ModuleFault_5064.Description: Right Front Outlet Valve Control Circuit Low

ModuleFault_5068.Description: Left Rear Outlet Valve Control Circuit Low

ModuleFault_506C.Description: Right Rear Outlet Valve Control Circuit Low

ModuleFault_5070.Description: Rear Outlet Valve Control Circuit Low

ModuleFault_5074.Description: ABS Pump Motor Control Circuit Performance

ModuleFault_5077.Description: ABS Pump Motor Excessive On Time

ModuleFault_5079.Description: Tone Wheel Teeth Count Range Performance

ModuleFault_507F.Description: Brake Lamp Inhibit Control Circuit Low

ModuleFault_5080.Description: Brake Lamp Inhibit Control Circuit High

ModuleFault_5087.Description: Brake Lamp Inhibit Control Circuit Performance

ModuleFault_5201.Description: Front Traction Control Inlet Valve Control Circuit Low

ModuleFault_5205.Description: Rear Traction Control Inlet Valve Control Circuit Low

ModuleFault_5209.Description: Front Traction Control Prime Valve Control Circuit Low

ModuleFault_520D.Description: Rear Traction Control Prime Valve Control Circuit Low

ModuleFault_5221.Description: Brake Pressure Sensor/Accelerator Pedal Position Sensor Correlation

ModuleFault_5227.Description: Brake Booster Travel Position Sensor Circuit Performance

ModuleFault_5228.Description: Brake Booster Travel Position Sensor Circuit Low

ModuleFault_5229.Description: Brake Booster Travel Position Sensor Circuit High

ModuleFault_522A.Description: Brake Booster Pedal Force Switch Circuit

ModuleFault_522B.Description: Brake Booster Pedal Force Switch Circuit Performance

ModuleFault_522C.Description: Active Brake Booster Control Circuit Supply Voltage

ModuleFault_5240.Description: Steering Angle Sensor Angle Overtravel Performance

ModuleFault_6105.Description: ABS Valve Supply Voltage Circuit Low

ModuleFault_6114.Description: ESP Sensor Cluster Supply Voltage Low

ModuleFault_6115.Description: ESP Sensor Cluster Supply Voltage High

ModuleFault_6116.Description: ABS Pump Motor Supply Low Voltage

ModuleFault_C114.Description: Lost Communication With Final Drive Control Module

ModuleFault_C125.Description: Lost Communication With ESP Sensor Cluster

ModuleFault_C126.Description: Lost Communication With Steering Angle Sensor Module

ModuleFault_C141.Description: Lost Communication With Front Control Module

ModuleFault_D501.Description: Implausible Message Data Length Received from ECM/PCM

ModuleFault_D502.Description: Implausible Message Data Length Received from TCM

ModuleFault_D503.Description: Implausible Message Data Length Received from FCM

ModuleFault_D504.Description: Implausible Message Data Length Received from Steering Angle Sensor Module

ModuleFault_D505.Description: Implausible Message Data Length Received from FDCM
